name: Claude Code Channels
summary: send messages from Telegram or Discord into a running Claude Code session — full filesystem, MCP, and git access from your phone

name: Google Stitch
summary: vibe design tool: describe a UI goal in plain english or voice, get multiple design directions + working prototype — free beta, integrates with Claude Code and Cursor

name: Firefly Custom Models
summary: train Firefly on your own images to create a reusable personal style model — consistent visual identity across AI generations

name: Gemini 3.1 + Computer Use API
summary: Computer Use tool now live in Gemini 3.1 Pro and Flash previews — build browser agents via the Gemini API today

name: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite
summary: cheapest capable Gemini yet at $0.25/1M input tokens — same Flash quality, lower price, available in the Gemini API now

name: Mistral Small 4
summary: Apache 2.0 open model with text + image support — 119B params, only 6B active (MoE), free to self-host or run via API

name: Gemini Spend Caps
summary: Gemini API finally gets monthly spend caps — removes the accidental runaway-bill risk for indie devs

name: Claude Memory
summary: Claude now remembers context and preferences across conversations — rolled out to all users
